title: Samurai's Tea Ceremony
description: Samurai in tea ceremony, seated warrior at rest in peaceful interior with paper screens and soft light.

title: Fuji at Dawn
description: Traditional Japanese pagoda with Mount Fuji rising in the background, framed by cherry blossoms in full bloom.

title: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
description: Towering bamboo stalks of Arashiyama in Kyoto, dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, deeply peaceful and meditative.

title: Warrior on Horseback
description: Samurai warrior on horseback crossing a river in autumn, red maple forest backdrop, majestic and powerful composition.

title: Edo Sumo Match
description: Edo period sumo wrestling match inside a traditional wooden arena, crowd packed around the dohyo, dramatic action captured.

title: Fuji at Golden Hour
description: Aerial view of Mount Fuji surrounded by autumn foliage in peak color, misty clouds drifting at the base, breathtaking scale.

title: Tokyo Skyline at Night
description: Tokyo rooftop view at night, a vast cityscape of lights stretching to the horizon, Tokyo Skytree glowing in the distance.

title: Edo Teahouse Morning
description: A traditional Japanese teahouse set in an Edo era garden, tatami floors visible through open shoji, bamboo fence, soft morning light.

title: Fushimi Inari at Dawn
description: Thousands of vermilion torii gates at Fushimi Inari shrine at dawn, morning mist rising, no crowds, an ethereal and sacred atmosphere.

title: Dragon of the Stormy Sea
description: Ukiyo-e style dragon emerging from a stormy sea, waves crashing dramatically, bold lines and vivid colors in the tradition of Hiroshige.

title: Golden Pavilion Reflection
description: Kinkaku-ji golden pavilion perfectly reflected in a mirror-still pond, surrounded by autumn maple trees in warm afternoon light.

title: Geisha in Spring Garden
description: Ukiyo-e style Mount Fuji with seven travelers on mountain path, stylized clouds, classic composition

title: Samurai's Path
description: Edo era riverside at twilight, wooden merchant boats moored along a calm canal, weeping willows, stone lanterns, no signs, painterly light

title: Zen Garden Morning
description: Kyoto zen temple raked gravel garden, moss and stones, minimalist composition, morning light

title: Castle Gate at Dawn
description: Ancient Edo castle gates at sunrise, mist over the moat, pine trees silhouettes, majestic and serene, no text

title: The Great Wave
description: Traditional ukiyo-e crane flying over pine trees and ocean, sunrise, gold and red palette

title: Akihabara Glow
description: Akihabara electric town at night, glowing LED signs and screens, futuristic urban landscape, no legible text

title: Mountain Onsen Dawn
description: Japanese countryside rice paddy fields in summer, terraced hillside, rural village, golden afternoon light

title: Shibuya Crossing Night
description: Akihabara electric town at night, glowing LED signs and screens, futuristic urban landscape, no legible text
